rulings.Case Title: CHARLES ENGELBERG VS. ELLEN TSANG, AS TRUSTEE OF THE ARZA TRUST et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 27, 2019 line 1. CROSS DEFENDANT CHARLES ENGELBERG DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT is CONTINUED to February 21, 2020. Parties to comply with Local Rule 2.7(B) by providing courtesy copies of the moving papers and opposition to the Court by February 7, 2020 with a cover page reflecting the new hearing date. =(501/CFH)
